# DWG/DXF Viewer Project Instructions

## Project Overview
A portable Windows .exe viewer for DWG and DXF files using Electron and LibreDWG, featuring file viewing and measurement tools.

## Setup Checklist

- [x] Create project directory
- [ ] Scaffold Electron project with LibreDWG
- [ ] Customize project for DWG/DXF viewing
- [ ] Install dependencies
- [ ] Build and test
- [ ] Create build configuration for portable .exe
- [ ] Documentation complete

## Technology Stack
- **Framework**: Electron (for portable .exe)
- **Library**: libredwg (open-source DWG/DXF reader)
- **Rendering**: Canvas API with zoom/pan support
- **Language**: JavaScript/TypeScript

## Requirements
- Node.js and npm
- Windows build tools for native modules
